title: Urgent Opening Hotel Manager at Taj SATS Digital Technologies

jsonLd.title: Urgent Opening Hotel Manager at Taj SATS Digital Technologies
jsonLd.description:
Taj SATS Digital Technologies is actively seeking a talented and motivated Hotel Manager to join our dynamic team in Surat. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Taj SATS Digital Technologies:
Taj SATS Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Deliver exceptional guest experiences in line with brand standards
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly
• Conduct regular guest satisfaction surveys and implement improvements
• Plan and execute banquets, events, and MICE functions
• Train and supervise front-line staff on service standards
• Assist in menu planning, costing, and food festival coordination
• Prepare daily operating reports and present to management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Tour Planning
• Proficiency in Customer Relations
• Proficiency in Sommelier Skills
• Proficiency in Hotel Management
• Proficiency in Front Office
• Proficiency in Food Safety
• Proficiency in Opera PMS
• Proficiency in Event Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Flexible working hours
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Surat, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Taj SATS Digital Technologies!
